text: hey you still up for cooking tonight or should we just order in? 😅
honestly just order in, I'm beat. thai?
yes!! pad see ew please 🙏 I'll find the menu
Hey love, just checking in — haven't heard from you in a few days. Everything ok? 💛
Sorry mum, been so flat out with work. I'm fine though! Miss you xx
As long as you're ok that's all that matters. Come for dinner Sunday? I'll do your favourite 😊
Hey Maggie, just checking in. Haven't heard from you in a few days, everything okay?
Hi Dad! Sorry, been slammed with work. All good though, just tired. How are you and mum?
We're fine, don't worry about us. Get some rest, okay? Call us this weekend when you have a minute 😊
Hey Margaret, just thinking about you — how are things going lately? Hope you're not burning yourself out again 😅
Toshio!! honestly it's been a lot but I'm holding up. finally got some clarity on the direction I want to take which feels good
That's what I like to hear. clarity is everything. let's catch up properly soon yeah?
hey margaret, quick q — do you remember when the autumn open studio plan is actually due? my calendar says friday but sarah mentioned thursday 😅
ugh i had to double check too lol — it's thursday! sarah's right, boss moved it last week
omg thank you!! would've been scrambling friday morning 😭
hey you still up for cooking tonight or should we just order in? 😅
honestly just order in, I'm beat. thai?
yes!! pad see ew please 🙏 I'll find the menu

Margaret, the crate specs from FedEx just landed. Eight pieces, double-boxed — I forwarded the dimensions.
Bonjour Margaret — collection window for the eight ceramic pieces confirmed for Oct 2, morning.
temple path this morning? mist is unreal
gas kiln free Thu–Sat if you want the reduction slot
How is the garden light this week? Send a photo when you walk.
Received. I'll confirm each vessel's foam bed before the pickup on the 2nd.
Thank you. All pieces will be wrapped and labelled by 9am; fragile-ware, signature required.
already back, coffee from the roaster. join for the Kitayama trail Sunday?
taking it — Seasonal Table plates need one more firing. cone 10?
Foggy mornings, camellias just opening. Call you Wednesday as usual.
Perfect. Riku's install photos from last year are in the Dropbox if you want the wall reference.
Noted fragile. We'll use the custom foam inserts Jean-Luc approved.
yes. I'll bring the flask. weather looks clear
cone 10 reduction, yes. I'll load my ewers on the bottom shelf

Looking now. The plinth heights look right for the two tall vases.
Please keep the tall vases upright — no lateral packing on those two.
cooking after — thinking grilled salmon with greens
let's pack wadding together tomorrow. anagama loading is next month
